news.title:
NALCO achieved record FY26 performance with highest-ever production and sales, including 31% alumina sales growth.
Bauxite excavation rose 6.1% YoY, alumina hydrate output hit 23L tonnes, and aluminium sales grew 2.8% YoY to 4.74L tonnes.
news.summary:
NALCO achieved record FY26 performance with highest-ever production and sales, including 31% alumina sales growth.
Bauxite excavation rose 6.1% YoY, alumina hydrate output hit 23L tonnes, and aluminium sales grew 2.8% YoY to 4.74L tonnes.

news.title:
NALCO projects FY26 alumina sales to hit 1.4 million tonnes.
Company targets new production and sales records in FY26.
news.summary:
NALCO projects FY26 alumina sales to hit 1.4 million tonnes.
Company targets new production and sales records in FY26.

news.title:
National Aluminium achieved record production in bauxite, alumina, aluminium, power, and coal.
Sales included 14.46L tonnes alumina, 4.74L tonnes aluminium; focus on efficiency and green initiatives.
news.summary:
National Aluminium achieved record production in bauxite, alumina, aluminium, power, and coal.
Sales included 14.46L tonnes alumina, 4.74L tonnes aluminium; focus on efficiency and green initiatives.

news.title:
Systematix flags a bearish Nifty trend in April, with 21,700-22,000 as critical support. Pharma emerges as a standout sector.
Bullish stocks include Astral, Aurobindo Pharma, Sun Pharma, Glenmark, Nalco, and Oil India. ICICI Prudential Life and BEL show bearish setups.
news.summary:
Systematix flags a bearish Nifty trend in April, with 21,700-22,000 as critical support. Pharma emerges as a standout sector.
Bullish stocks include Astral, Aurobindo Pharma, Sun Pharma, Glenmark, Nalco, and Oil India. ICICI Prudential Life and BEL show bearish setups.

news.title:
Chandan Taparia recommends buying National Aluminium Co. (Target: ₹410, SL: ₹375) and ONGC (Target: ₹302, SL: ₹275).
Taparia suggests selling United Spirits futures (Target: ₹1,150, SL: ₹1,260) due to bearish patterns.
news.summary:
Chandan Taparia recommends buying National Aluminium Co. (Target: ₹410, SL: ₹375) and ONGC (Target: ₹302, SL: ₹275).
Taparia suggests selling United Spirits futures (Target: ₹1,150, SL: ₹1,260) due to bearish patterns.

news.title:
Analysts recommend Nalco, ONGC, Coal India, MRPL, and GAIL for buy, citing technical and sectoral trends.
Nalco targets Rs 410-440, ONGC Rs 302, Coal India Rs 475, MRPL Rs 202, and GAIL Rs 146 with respective stop losses.
news.summary:
Analysts recommend Nalco, ONGC, Coal India, MRPL, and GAIL for buy, citing technical and sectoral trends.
Nalco targets Rs 410-440, ONGC Rs 302, Coal India Rs 475, MRPL Rs 202, and GAIL Rs 146 with respective stop losses.

news.title:
Nifty Metal rose 1.4%, led by Nalco (+6.1%), Hindalco (+4.3%), and Vedanta (+3.7%).
Global aluminium prices surged due to Middle East tensions; Indian producers may benefit temporarily.
news.summary:
Nifty Metal rose 1.4%, led by Nalco (+6.1%), Hindalco (+4.3%), and Vedanta (+3.7%).
Global aluminium prices surged due to Middle East tensions; Indian producers may benefit temporarily.

news.title:
Sumeet Bagadia recommends five breakout stocks: National Aluminium, NLC India, Honasa Consumer, Ather Energy, and Aurobindo Pharma.
Nifty 50 fell 2.1% to 22,819.6; Sensex dropped 2.3% to 73,583.2 amid weak sentiment and geopolitical tensions.
news.summary:
Sumeet Bagadia recommends five breakout stocks: National Aluminium, NLC India, Honasa Consumer, Ather Energy, and Aurobindo Pharma.
Nifty 50 fell 2.1% to 22,819.6; Sensex dropped 2.3% to 73,583.2 amid weak sentiment and geopolitical tensions.

news.title:
1.2 mt bauxite shipments from Guinea were diverted to India due to the West Asia crisis, benefiting domestic alumina production.
Ports like Visakhapatnam handled shipments, aiding firms like NALCO, Vedanta, and Hindalco amid India's bauxite production gap.
news.summary:
1.2 mt bauxite shipments from Guinea were diverted to India due to the West Asia crisis, benefiting domestic alumina production.
Ports like Visakhapatnam handled shipments, aiding firms like NALCO, Vedanta, and Hindalco amid India's bauxite production gap.

news.title:
NALCO fined Rs. 5.42 lakh for non-compliance with SEBI Regulation 17(1).
Non-compliance due to insufficient independent directors; waiver requested.
news.summary:
NALCO fined Rs. 5.42 lakh for non-compliance with SEBI Regulation 17(1).
Non-compliance due to insufficient independent directors; waiver requested.

news.title:
Metal stocks like NALCO, Hindustan Zinc, and Tata Steel nosedived due to weak global cues and gas supply concerns.
Sensex dropped over 900 points, Nifty fell 300 points, marking a third consecutive session of losses.
news.summary:
Metal stocks like NALCO, Hindustan Zinc, and Tata Steel nosedived due to weak global cues and gas supply concerns.
Sensex dropped over 900 points, Nifty fell 300 points, marking a third consecutive session of losses.

news.title:
Nalco shares rose 8% post West Asia conflict as aluminium prices hit $3,400/tonne, highest since May 2022.
Despite strong demand, muted alumina prices and limited production may cap Nalco's near-term upside.
news.summary:
Nalco shares rose 8% post West Asia conflict as aluminium prices hit $3,400/tonne, highest since May 2022.
Despite strong demand, muted alumina prices and limited production may cap Nalco's near-term upside.

news.title:
Nalco requests Odisha govt to expedite land handover for ₹30,000 cr expansion.
Plans include 0.5 mtpa smelter at Angul & 1,080 MW coal CPP for ₹18,000 cr & ₹12,000 cr.
news.summary:
Nalco requests Odisha govt to expedite land handover for ₹30,000 cr expansion.
Plans include 0.5 mtpa smelter at Angul & 1,080 MW coal CPP for ₹18,000 cr & ₹12,000 cr.

news.title:
Nalco, Hindalco, Vedanta shares may react as Qatalum halts aluminium production, raising supply concerns.
US-Iran conflict disrupts Gulf aluminium output, potentially affecting Indian producers tied to global trends.
news.summary:
Nalco, Hindalco, Vedanta shares may react as Qatalum halts aluminium production, raising supply concerns.
US-Iran conflict disrupts Gulf aluminium output, potentially affecting Indian producers tied to global trends.

news.title:
National Aluminium Co. Ltd. faces fines of Rs.10.9L incl. GST from BSE and NSE for SEBI LODR Regulation 17(1) non-compliance.
The company is representing its position to BSE and NSE regarding the identified non-compliance.
news.summary:
National Aluminium Co. Ltd. faces fines of Rs.10.9L incl. GST from BSE and NSE for SEBI LODR Regulation 17(1) non-compliance.
The company is representing its position to BSE and NSE regarding the identified non-compliance.

news.title:
NALCO's gallium extraction project, initiated in 2016 with BARC, remains unstarted after 10 years.
The project aimed to extract gallium from Bayer sodium aluminate liquor during alumina refining.
news.summary:
NALCO's gallium extraction project, initiated in 2016 with BARC, remains unstarted after 10 years.
The project aimed to extract gallium from Bayer sodium aluminate liquor during alumina refining.

news.title:
National Aluminium Co. Ltd will meet institutional investors on Feb 10, 2026, at the Systematix India Annual Conference in Mumbai.
Investors include HDFC Life, Groww MF, Edelweiss MF, and others. No UPSI will be shared during these meetings.
news.summary:
National Aluminium Co. Ltd will meet institutional investors on Feb 10, 2026, at the Systematix India Annual Conference in Mumbai.
Investors include HDFC Life, Groww MF, Edelweiss MF, and others. No UPSI will be shared during these meetings.

news.title:
National Aluminium posted best-ever physical and financial performance in Q3 and 9M FY26.
Revenue rose 13% YoY; alumina volume up 20%, metal volume up 3.5% with mixed price impact.
news.summary:
National Aluminium posted best-ever physical and financial performance in Q3 and 9M FY26.
Revenue rose 13% YoY; alumina volume up 20%, metal volume up 3.5% with mixed price impact.

news.title:
National Aluminium saw a block deal worth Rs 41.9 Cr on Feb 4, 2026.
The deal involved one seller and one buyer.
news.summary:
National Aluminium saw a block deal worth Rs 41.9 Cr on Feb 4, 2026.
The deal involved one seller and one buyer.

news.title:
National Aluminium surged 5.03% on 2 Feb 2026, closing at Rs 371.
The rebound follows a two-day decline, boosting the non-ferrous metals sector.
news.summary:
National Aluminium surged 5.03% on 2 Feb 2026, closing at Rs 371.
The rebound follows a two-day decline, boosting the non-ferrous metals sector.
